claims.title: Wealth Inequality Proves Capitalism Is Broken
claims.socialistClaim: Rising wealth inequality proves capitalism is fundamentally broken and immoral.
claims.executiveSummary: Relative inequality metrics tell us nothing about absolute living standards without context. The U.S. bottom quintile real consumption has risen dramatically since 1960 while global extreme poverty collapsed under market integration. Inequality can rise while everyone gets richer.
evidenceBullets: Chetty: ~7.5% of bottom-quintile children reach top quintile
claims.whyItMatters: America debates envy metrics instead of mobility and poverty reduction.
claims.searchText: Wealth Inequality Proves Capitalism Is Broken Rising wealth inequality proves capitalism is fundamentally broken and immoral. Relative inequality metrics tell us nothing about absolute living standards without context. The U.S. bottom quintile real consumption has risen dramatically since 1960 while global extreme poverty collapsed under market integration. Inequality can rise while everyone gets richer. inequality wealth gini mobility

claims.title: Income Inequality Equals Material Deprivation
claims.socialistClaim: The poor are getting poorer because the income gap is widening.
claims.executiveSummary: Income snapshots ignore taxes, transfers, household size, and lifecycle effects. Consumption inequality is far narrower than income inequality in the U.S.
evidenceBullets: Meyer & Sullivan: consumption inequality narrower than income
BLS CEX: broad durable goods access at lower incomes
claims.whyItMatters: Political rhetoric uses pre-tax income to manufacture crises consumption data does not support.
claims.searchText: Income Inequality Equals Material Deprivation The poor are getting poorer because the income gap is widening. Income snapshots ignore taxes, transfers, household size, and lifecycle effects. Consumption inequality is far narrower than income inequality in the U.S. consumption income poverty

claims.title: The Gini Coefficient Proves Unfairness
claims.socialistClaim: America's Gini coefficient proves our system is unfair.
claims.executiveSummary: Gini measures dispersion, not injustice. Mixed economies with heavy transfers can share similar Ginis while differing in growth and mobility.
evidenceBullets: Heritage: economic freedom correlates with prosperity
Gini ignores transfers and household composition
claims.whyItMatters: Policy-by-Gini replaces serious analysis of institutions and opportunity.
claims.searchText: The Gini Coefficient Proves Unfairness America's Gini coefficient proves our system is unfair. Gini measures dispersion, not injustice. Mixed economies with heavy transfers can share similar Ginis while differing in growth and mobility. gini inequality

claims.title: The American Dream Is Dead
claims.socialistClaim: Poor Americans are stuck with no upward mobility.
claims.executiveSummary: Mobility varies by county and policy environment. Family structure, schools, and economic freedom predict outcomes more than slogans.
claims.whyItMatters: Declaring mobility dead discourages the institutional reforms that actually help.
claims.searchText: The American Dream Is Dead Poor Americans are stuck with no upward mobility. Mobility varies by county and policy environment. Family structure, schools, and economic freedom predict outcomes more than slogans. mobility american dream

claims.title: Billionaires Shouldn't Exist
claims.socialistClaim: No one should have a billion dollars while others starve.
claims.executiveSummary: Wealth at scale often reflects value creation. Poverty is addressed by growth and institutions, not wealth caps that drive away capital.
evidenceBullets: World Bank: global poverty fell during era of tech wealth creation
Tax Foundation: wealth tax revenue and capital flight risks
claims.whyItMatters: Envy-driven policy risks the investment that creates jobs for ordinary Americans.
claims.searchText: Billionaires Shouldn't Exist No one should have a billion dollars while others starve. Wealth at scale often reflects value creation. Poverty is addressed by growth and institutions, not wealth caps that drive away capital. billionaires wealth tax

claims.title: Poverty Is Only Structural Racism
claims.socialistClaim: Capitalism and racism are the same system causing poverty.
claims.executiveSummary: Racial gaps are real but respond to opportunity-expanding reforms and market participation, not collectivization.
claims.whyItMatters: Oversimplified narratives block bipartisan institutional fixes.
claims.searchText: Poverty Is Only Structural Racism Capitalism and racism are the same system causing poverty. Racial gaps are real but respond to opportunity-expanding reforms and market participation, not collectivization. racism poverty inequality

claims.title: Profit Is Theft From Workers
claims.socialistClaim: Profit is surplus value stolen from workers.
claims.executiveSummary: Profit compensates uncertainty, coordination, and innovation. Competitive markets compress excess returns. Value is subjective, not embedded labor-hours.
claims.whyItMatters: Anti-profit rhetoric undermines the incentive structure that raises wages via productivity.
claims.searchText: Profit Is Theft From Workers Profit is surplus value stolen from workers. Profit compensates uncertainty, coordination, and innovation. Competitive markets compress excess returns. Value is subjective, not embedded labor-hours. profit exploitation marx

claims.title: Workers Are Exploited Under Capitalism
claims.socialistClaim: Capitalists exploit workers by paying less than value created.
claims.executiveSummary: Voluntary exchange, consumer surplus, and capital deepening raise marginal product. Real compensation tracks productivity where markets function.
claims.whyItMatters: Exploitation framing replaces negotiation, mobility, and entrepreneurship as paths upward.
claims.searchText: Workers Are Exploited Under Capitalism Capitalists exploit workers by paying less than value created. Voluntary exchange, consumer surplus, and capital deepening raise marginal product. Real compensation tracks productivity where markets function. exploitation workers wages

claims.title: The Rich Get Richer, Poor Get Poorer
claims.socialistClaim: Under capitalism the rich always get richer while the poor get poorer.
claims.executiveSummary: Both groups can rise simultaneously. Census and World Bank data show rising real incomes at the bottom over decades.
evidenceBullets: Census: real median household income records
World Bank: global poverty decline since 1990
claims.whyItMatters: Zero-sum myths justify redistribution that can shrink the pie for everyone.
claims.searchText: The Rich Get Richer, Poor Get Poorer Under capitalism the rich always get richer while the poor get poorer. Both groups can rise simultaneously. Census and World Bank data show rising real incomes at the bottom over decades. rich poor zero-sum

claims.title: Worker Cooperatives Prove Socialism Works
claims.socialistClaim: Co-ops outperform capitalist firms and prove socialism.
claims.executiveSummary: Co-ops thrive in niches but face capital and scale constraints. Their existence proves market pluralism, not abolition of private ownership.
evidenceBullets: Mondragon: successful but limited scale model
claims.whyItMatters: Co-ops are a voluntary form, not a mandate to abolish investor-owned firms.
claims.searchText: Worker Cooperatives Prove Socialism Works Co-ops outperform capitalist firms and prove socialism. Co-ops thrive in niches but face capital and scale constraints. Their existence proves market pluralism, not abolition of private ownership. cooperatives workers

claims.title: Finance Is Parasitic on the Real Economy
claims.socialistClaim: Banks add no value — pure extraction.
claims.executiveSummary: Financial intermediation allocates capital to productive uses. Shallow capital markets correlate with slower growth.
evidenceBullets: Developing nations: shallow finance limits growth
claims.whyItMatters: Demonizing finance invites policy that starves Main Street of credit.
claims.searchText: Finance Is Parasitic on the Real Economy Banks add no value — pure extraction. Financial intermediation allocates capital to productive uses. Shallow capital markets correlate with slower growth. finance banks

claims.title: USSR Wasn't Real Socialism
claims.socialistClaim: Every socialist failure was not real socialism.
claims.executiveSummary: The USSR implemented state ownership, central planning, and one-party control. Outcomes: famine, gulags, stagnation, collapse.
claims.whyItMatters: No-true-Scotsman prevents learning from the largest socialist experiment in history.
claims.searchText: USSR Wasn't Real Socialism Every socialist failure was not real socialism. The USSR implemented state ownership, central planning, and one-party control. Outcomes: famine, gulags, stagnation, collapse. ussr socialism history

claims.title: Mao's China Was Misunderstood
claims.socialistClaim: Mao-era famine is Western propaganda.
claims.executiveSummary: Archival and demographic work documents catastrophic famine from collectivization (1958-1962). Dikötter estimates ~45 million deaths.
evidenceBullets: Dikötter: Mao's Great Famine archival evidence
claims.whyItMatters: Denying Mao-era catastrophe blocks honest comparison of institutions.
claims.searchText: Mao's China Was Misunderstood Mao-era famine is Western propaganda. Archival and demographic work documents catastrophic famine from collectivization (1958-1962). Dikötter estimates ~45 million deaths. china mao famine

claims.title: Venezuela Failed Due to Sanctions
claims.socialistClaim: Venezuela collapsed because of U.S. sanctions, not socialism.
claims.executiveSummary: Economic free-fall followed expropriations, price controls, and money printing before major oil sanctions. Oil output collapsed under state management.
claims.whyItMatters: Sanctions-blame avoids lessons on property rights and monetary discipline.
claims.searchText: Venezuela Failed Due to Sanctions Venezuela collapsed because of U.S. sanctions, not socialism. Economic free-fall followed expropriations, price controls, and money printing before major oil sanctions. Oil output collapsed under state management. venezuela sanctions socialism

claims.title: Cuba Has Better Healthcare Than the U.S.
claims.socialistClaim: Cuba proves socialism delivers superior outcomes.
claims.executiveSummary: Official Cuban statistics lack independent audit. Mass emigration and dual-currency realities contradict paradise narratives.
claims.whyItMatters: Romanticizing Cuba obscures lack of political and economic freedom.
claims.searchText: Cuba Has Better Healthcare Than the U.S. Cuba proves socialism delivers superior outcomes. Official Cuban statistics lack independent audit. Mass emigration and dual-currency realities contradict paradise narratives. cuba healthcare

claims.title: Khmer Rouge Was an Aberration
claims.socialistClaim: Pol Pot does not count as socialism.
claims.executiveSummary: Democratic Kampuchea abolished money and collectivized agriculture. Estimated 1.5-2 million deaths from execution, famine, and forced labor.
claims.whyItMatters: Radical egalitarian projects can produce radical horror.
claims.searchText: Khmer Rouge Was an Aberration Pol Pot does not count as socialism. Democratic Kampuchea abolished money and collectivized agriculture. Estimated 1.5-2 million deaths from execution, famine, and forced labor. cambodia khmer rouge

claims.title: Nordic Countries Are Socialist
claims.socialistClaim: We should be like Sweden — democratic socialism works.
claims.executiveSummary: Nordics are market economies with open trade and strong property rights. High taxes fund welfare, not collective ownership of production.
claims.whyItMatters: Mislabeling Nordics as socialist leads to wrong policy imports.
claims.searchText: Nordic Countries Are Socialist We should be like Sweden — democratic socialism works. Nordics are market economies with open trade and strong property rights. High taxes fund welfare, not collective ownership of production. nordic sweden democratic socialism

claims.title: Nordics Succeeded Because of Socialism
claims.socialistClaim: Nordic prosperity proves socialism works.
claims.executiveSummary: Prosperity predates the modern welfare state. Post-1990 reforms liberalized markets after crisis.
claims.whyItMatters: Credit belongs to institutions and trade, not redistribution alone.
claims.searchText: Nordics Succeeded Because of Socialism Nordic prosperity proves socialism works. Prosperity predates the modern welfare state. Post-1990 reforms liberalized markets after crisis. nordic prosperity

claims.title: Democratic Socialism Is Just Welfare
claims.socialistClaim: Democratic socialism is just Scandinavian welfare.
claims.executiveSummary: Modern democratic socialists advocate worker ownership and nationalization beyond Nordic tax-and-transfer models.
claims.whyItMatters: Voters deserve clarity on what policies are actually proposed.
claims.searchText: Democratic Socialism Is Just Welfare Democratic socialism is just Scandinavian welfare. Modern democratic socialists advocate worker ownership and nationalization beyond Nordic tax-and-transfer models. democratic socialism welfare

claims.title: Democratic Socialism Avoids Authoritarianism
claims.socialistClaim: Democratic socialism cannot become authoritarian.
claims.executiveSummary: Elected mandates enabled Chavez authoritarianism and Weimar-era central planning politics. Democracy needs constitutional limits.
claims.whyItMatters: Unlimited majorities can extinguish the liberties socialism claims to expand.
claims.searchText: Democratic Socialism Avoids Authoritarianism Democratic socialism cannot become authoritarian. Elected mandates enabled Chavez authoritarianism and Weimar-era central planning politics. Democracy needs constitutional limits. democracy authoritarianism

claims.title: Economic Democracy Replaces Exploitation
claims.socialistClaim: Workers voting on production ends exploitation.
claims.executiveSummary: Votes over capital allocation recreate calculation and knowledge problems. Political majorities can expropriate minorities.
evidenceBullets: Mises: calculation problem for worker councils
claims.whyItMatters: Firm-level democracy without prices duplicates planning failures.
claims.searchText: Economic Democracy Replaces Exploitation Workers voting on production ends exploitation. Votes over capital allocation recreate calculation and knowledge problems. Political majorities can expropriate minorities. economic democracy cooperatives

claims.title: Central Planning Works With Modern AI
claims.socialistClaim: AI makes socialist planning feasible.
claims.executiveSummary: Hayek's knowledge problem is not computing speed — prices aggregate tacit local knowledge no dataset captures.
evidenceBullets: Hayek: The Use of Knowledge in Society
Mises: Economic Calculation in the Socialist Commonwealth
claims.whyItMatters: Techno-utopian planning revives failed ideas with new buzzwords.
claims.searchText: Central Planning Works With Modern AI AI makes socialist planning feasible. Hayek's knowledge problem is not computing speed — prices aggregate tacit local knowledge no dataset captures. calculation problem hayek planning

claims.title: People Work Hard Without Profit
claims.socialistClaim: Humans will produce enthusiastically without material incentives.
claims.executiveSummary: USSR, Mao, and Venezuela show incentive erosion, shortages, and corruption when property rights weaken.
claims.whyItMatters: Ignoring incentives produces policy that sounds moral but harms the poor.
claims.searchText: People Work Hard Without Profit Humans will produce enthusiastically without material incentives. USSR, Mao, and Venezuela show incentive erosion, shortages, and corruption when property rights weaken. incentives human nature

claims.title: Humans Are Naturally Cooperative Not Competitive
claims.socialistClaim: Markets impose unnatural greed.
claims.executiveSummary: Markets channel self-interest through voluntary exchange. Cooperation requires institutions that align incentives.
claims.whyItMatters: Markets are cooperation at scale, not greed unleashed.
claims.searchText: Humans Are Naturally Cooperative Not Competitive Markets impose unnatural greed. Markets channel self-interest through voluntary exchange. Cooperation requires institutions that align incentives. human nature cooperation

claims.title: Market Failures Require Socialism
claims.socialistClaim: Externalities prove markets fail — only socialism fixes them.
claims.executiveSummary: Pigouvian taxes, Coasean property rights, and permit markets address externalities without abolishing ownership.
claims.whyItMatters: Externalities justify correction, not collectivization.
claims.searchText: Market Failures Require Socialism Externalities prove markets fail — only socialism fixes them. Pigouvian taxes, Coasean property rights, and permit markets address externalities without abolishing ownership. market failure externalities

claims.title: Minimum Wage Raises Don't Cost Jobs
claims.socialistClaim: Minimum wage increases help workers with no downside.
claims.executiveSummary: When wages exceed marginal product for some workers, hours and employment compress — especially for teens and low-skill entrants.
claims.whyItMatters: Well-intentioned wage floors can exclude the most vulnerable from first rungs.
claims.searchText: Minimum Wage Raises Don't Cost Jobs Minimum wage increases help workers with no downside. When wages exceed marginal product for some workers, hours and employment compress — especially for teens and low-skill entrants. minimum wage jobs

claims.title: Minimum Wage Is Best Anti-Poverty Tool
claims.socialistClaim: Raising minimum wage is the best way to fight poverty.
claims.executiveSummary: Most minimum-wage earners are not household breadwinners in poverty. EITC targets poverty more precisely.
claims.whyItMatters: Wrong tool wastes political capital that could fund EITC expansion.
claims.searchText: Minimum Wage Is Best Anti-Poverty Tool Raising minimum wage is the best way to fight poverty. Most minimum-wage earners are not household breadwinners in poverty. EITC targets poverty more precisely. minimum wage poverty eitc

claims.title: Healthcare Is a Right — Single Payer Now
claims.socialistClaim: Healthcare is a human right requiring single-payer.
claims.executiveSummary: Rights as claims on others' labor imply coercion. Single-payer systems face wait times and rationing.
claims.whyItMatters: Rights language obscures tradeoffs between access, quality, and fiscal sustainability.
claims.searchText: Healthcare Is a Right — Single Payer Now Healthcare is a human right requiring single-payer. Rights as claims on others' labor imply coercion. Single-payer systems face wait times and rationing. healthcare single payer

claims.title: Free Markets Can't Provide Healthcare
claims.socialistClaim: Only government can control healthcare costs.
claims.executiveSummary: Medical cost inflation accelerated after Medicare/Medicaid expansion — classic third-party payer problem.
evidenceBullets: Medical CPI vs general CPI divergence
claims.whyItMatters: More third-party payment may worsen the cost disease it claims to cure.
claims.searchText: Free Markets Can't Provide Healthcare Only government can control healthcare costs. Medical cost inflation accelerated after Medicare/Medicaid expansion — classic third-party payer problem. healthcare costs

claims.title: UBI Will End Poverty
claims.socialistClaim: Universal Basic Income eliminates poverty and job fears.
claims.executiveSummary: UBI faces enormous fiscal cost and mixed labor supply evidence from pilots.
claims.whyItMatters: Fiscal reality limits UBI scale without damaging growth.
claims.searchText: UBI Will End Poverty Universal Basic Income eliminates poverty and job fears. UBI faces enormous fiscal cost and mixed labor supply evidence from pilots. ubi poverty

claims.title: Rent Control Protects the Poor
claims.socialistClaim: Rent control keeps housing affordable.
claims.executiveSummary: Rent control reduces supply and maintenance. Stanford found SF rent control raised citywide rents 5-10%.
evidenceBullets: Diamond et al. Stanford SF study
claims.whyItMatters: Rent control helps incumbents at the expense of newcomers and builders.
claims.searchText: Rent Control Protects the Poor Rent control keeps housing affordable. Rent control reduces supply and maintenance. Stanford found SF rent control raised citywide rents 5-10%. rent control housing

claims.title: Green New Deal Creates Prosperity
claims.socialistClaim: Massive state green investment will grow the economy.
claims.executiveSummary: Central energy allocation risks malinvestment. Market carbon pricing plus innovation outperforms command-and-control.
claims.whyItMatters: Climate policy should not repeat industrial planning failures.
claims.searchText: Green New Deal Creates Prosperity Massive state green investment will grow the economy. Central energy allocation risks malinvestment. Market carbon pricing plus innovation outperforms command-and-control. green new deal climate

claims.title: College Should Be Free
claims.socialistClaim: Student debt proves capitalism failed education.
claims.executiveSummary: Tuition subsidies inflate administrative bloat. Market alternatives address access without zero price signals.
evidenceBullets: Federal aid correlation with tuition inflation
claims.whyItMatters: Free tuition without reform subsidizes bureaucracy, not learning.
claims.searchText: College Should Be Free Student debt proves capitalism failed education. Tuition subsidies inflate administrative bloat. Market alternatives address access without zero price signals. education student debt

claims.title: Capitalism Created Global Poverty
claims.socialistClaim: Colonialism and capitalism impoverished the Global South.
claims.executiveSummary: Extreme poverty fell fastest where countries integrated with global markets — China, India, Vietnam.
claims.whyItMatters: Anti-market narratives ignore the greatest poverty reduction in history.
claims.searchText: Capitalism Created Global Poverty Colonialism and capitalism impoverished the Global South. Extreme poverty fell fastest where countries integrated with global markets — China, India, Vietnam. poverty global south capitalism

claims.title: All Poverty Is Colonial Legacy
claims.socialistClaim: Modern poverty is purely colonial legacy.
claims.executiveSummary: Singapore, Botswana, and South Korea outperformed after institutional and market reforms.
claims.whyItMatters: Institutions today matter more than history alone for policy.
claims.searchText: All Poverty Is Colonial Legacy Modern poverty is purely colonial legacy. Singapore, Botswana, and South Korea outperformed after institutional and market reforms. colonialism development

claims.title: Africa Is Poor Because of Western Exploitation
claims.socialistClaim: Africa remains poor because the West exploits it.
claims.executiveSummary: Internal institutions, conflict, and policy dominate. African nations improving economic freedom grow faster.
claims.whyItMatters: Victim narratives excuse corrupt governance that hurts Africans most.
claims.searchText: Africa Is Poor Because of Western Exploitation Africa remains poor because the West exploits it. Internal institutions, conflict, and policy dominate. African nations improving economic freedom grow faster. africa exploitation

claims.title: Founders Supported Collectivism
claims.socialistClaim: The Founders would support modern democratic socialism.
claims.executiveSummary: Madison and Jefferson warned against consolidated power and factional redistribution. Constitution protects property and liberty.
claims.whyItMatters: Founding literacy is essential to constitutional debate.
claims.searchText: Founders Supported Collectivism The Founders would support modern democratic socialism. Madison and Jefferson warned against consolidated power and factional redistribution. Constitution protects property and liberty. founders constitution

claims.title: Constitution Mandates Welfare Expansion
claims.socialistClaim: The Constitution requires modern welfare programs.
claims.executiveSummary: Constitution enumerates limited powers. Redistribution is political choice, not constitutional mandate.
claims.whyItMatters: Conflating politics with constitutional duty erodes civic education.
claims.searchText: Constitution Mandates Welfare Expansion The Constitution requires modern welfare programs. Constitution enumerates limited powers. Redistribution is political choice, not constitutional mandate. constitution welfare

claims.title: Rights Come From Government
claims.socialistClaim: Rights are whatever society democratically grants.
claims.executiveSummary: Founders held rights pre-exist government. Government exists to secure them.
claims.whyItMatters: Contingent rights are rights no minority can trust.
claims.searchText: Rights Come From Government Rights are whatever society democratically grants. Founders held rights pre-exist government. Government exists to secure them. rights natural law

claims.title: Borders Are Capitalist Oppression
claims.socialistClaim: Open borders are required for justice.
claims.executiveSummary: Sovereignty enables rule of law and public goods. Unrestricted migration strains fiscal capacity — Bastiat seen/unseen applies.
claims.whyItMatters: Open borders advocacy conflicts with large welfare states.
claims.searchText: Borders Are Capitalist Oppression Open borders are required for justice. Sovereignty enables rule of law and public goods. Unrestricted migration strains fiscal capacity — Bastiat seen/unseen applies. borders immigration

claims.title: Socialist Regimes Support Free Speech
claims.socialistClaim: Real socialism empowers the people's voice.
claims.executiveSummary: USSR, China, Cuba, and Venezuela criminalized or crushed dissent systematically.
claims.whyItMatters: Free speech is the first casualty when state power owns the public square.
claims.searchText: Socialist Regimes Support Free Speech Real socialism empowers the people's voice. USSR, China, Cuba, and Venezuela criminalized or crushed dissent systematically. free speech censorship

claims.title: Private Censorship Is Worse Than State
claims.socialistClaim: Corporate moderation is fascism worse than socialist states.
claims.executiveSummary: State censorship uses force and imprisonment. Private moderation is contractual — different category.
claims.whyItMatters: Conflating categories obscures socialist regimes' dissent record.
claims.searchText: Private Censorship Is Worse Than State Corporate moderation is fascism worse than socialist states. State censorship uses force and imprisonment. Private moderation is contractual — different category. censorship free speech

claims.title: Late-Stage Capitalism Is Collapsing
claims.socialistClaim: We are in late-stage capitalism — collapse is imminent.
claims.executiveSummary: No terminal stage exists in market economies. GDP, life expectancy, and technology continue upward in market nations.
evidenceBullets: Our World in Data life expectancy
claims.whyItMatters: Apocalyptic framing replaces measurable policy debate.
claims.searchText: Late-Stage Capitalism Is Collapsing We are in late-stage capitalism — collapse is imminent. No terminal stage exists in market economies. GDP, life expectancy, and technology continue upward in market nations. late stage capitalism collapse

claims.title: Capitalism Inevitably Creates Monopolies
claims.socialistClaim: Markets always monopolize without socialism.
claims.executiveSummary: Entry, disruption, and antitrust limit durable monopoly. State monopolies face no entry discipline.
claims.whyItMatters: Competition policy beats nationalization for consumer welfare.
claims.searchText: Capitalism Inevitably Creates Monopolies Markets always monopolize without socialism. Entry, disruption, and antitrust limit durable monopoly. State monopolies face no entry discipline. monopoly antitrust

claims.title: Capitalism Destroyed the Climate
claims.socialistClaim: Only socialism can solve climate change.
claims.executiveSummary: Economic freedom correlates with environmental outcomes via innovation. USSR was a notorious polluter.
claims.whyItMatters: Central planning is not inherently green — history shows the opposite.
claims.searchText: Capitalism Destroyed the Climate Only socialism can solve climate change. Economic freedom correlates with environmental outcomes via innovation. USSR was a notorious polluter. climate environment

claims.title: Housing Crisis Proves Capitalism Failed
claims.socialistClaim: Housing unaffordability is late-stage capitalism.
claims.executiveSummary: Zoning and land-use regulation constrain supply. Government restrictions dominate coastal affordability crises.
claims.whyItMatters: Deregulating supply beats price controls for housing affordability.
claims.searchText: Housing Crisis Proves Capitalism Failed Housing unaffordability is late-stage capitalism. Zoning and land-use regulation constrain supply. Government restrictions dominate coastal affordability crises. housing zoning

claims.title: Automation Causes Permanent Unemployment
claims.socialistClaim: Robots will leave everyone unemployed under capitalism.
claims.executiveSummary: Technology displaces tasks but raises productivity and creates new work. Lump of labor is a fallacy.
claims.whyItMatters: Automation panic justifies Luddite policy that slows progress.
claims.searchText: Automation Causes Permanent Unemployment Robots will leave everyone unemployed under capitalism. Technology displaces tasks but raises productivity and creates new work. Lump of labor is a fallacy. automation jobs ai
